---
title: "renmods variables"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{renmods variables}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>"
)
```

ENMODS contains many variables and parameters. They have a reference list for these
variables online: https://www2.gov.bc.ca/gov/content/environment/research-monitoring-reporting/monitoring/environmental-monitoring-data-system#resources

renmods adds a couple of extra variables created from the data. 

- `filename` - This is the original file name and location of the downloaded data
- `ren_date` - This is the local Date drawn from the `Observed_Date_Time` column
- `tz` - This is the original timezone of the data, retrieved from `Observed_Date_Time` before it was converted to UTC-7:00.
